name: Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pork and beans, then place them in an oven-safe bowl.
2. Chop the onion and apples, and add them to the beans along with the Bar-B-Que sauce, brown sugar, and raisins.
3. Mix everything together and arrange the bacon strips on top.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
